kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Godfrey goes with at most one of Carpenter, Knight, and 16 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Rowan goes with Cooper; Wulfric goes with 12 coins; Bridgegate goes with Baron.
Bishop goes with exactly two of Rowan, Fletcher, Millpond, and 20 coins.
Sheriff goes with exactly two of Godfrey, Weaver, Bridgegate, and 20 coins.
Either Rowan belongs to the Joiners' Guild or all members of the Hill Ward belong to the Joiners' Guild.
Baron, Bishop, and Countess go with Potter, 12 coins, and 20 coins, in some order.
The artisan in Millpond's levy is higher than both Cedric and the artisan serving the Countess.
Between Potter and Weaver, one goes with Cedric and the other with Countess.
The artisan in Oldwall's levy is lower than both Beatrix and the artisan serving the Knight.
Godfrey belongs to the Hill Ward.
At least two of (the members of the Hill Ward and the Weaver) go with (Countess or Knight).
Exactly one member of the Joiners' Guild is in the Market Ward.
Sheriff goes with at least three of Rowan, Weaver, Bridgegate, and 14 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Mabel goes with at most one of Bass, Swimbait, and 14 lb.
Exactly one of these is true: Royce goes with Bluegill; Wade goes with 12 lb; Cedarmere goes with Buzzbait.
Jig goes with exactly two of Royce, Catfish, Stillwater, and 16 lb.
Wobbler goes with exactly two of Mabel, Perch, Cedarmere, and 16 lb.
Either Royce belongs to the Pike Family or all members of the East Watershed belong to the Pike Family.
Buzzbait, Jig, and Spoon go with Crappie, 12 lb, and 16 lb, in some order.
The angler at Stillwater's weight is higher than both Esther and the angler using the Spoon.
Between Crappie and Perch, one goes with Esther and the other with Spoon.
The angler at Willowmere's weight is lower than both Cody and the angler using the Swimbait.
Mabel belongs to the East Watershed.
At least two of (the members of the East Watershed and the angler who landed the Perch) go with (Spoon or Swimbait).
Exactly one member of the Pike Family is in the North Watershed.
Wobbler goes with at least three of Royce, Perch, Cedarmere, and 13 lb.
